rules.rule: State positively which phone surface faces the camera: "she holds the phone up with its bright screen facing the camera, clearly showing the <app> home screen exactly as in the reference image". Never write bare "holding a phone"; never mention the back of the phone unless the shot is a tagged reveal first-frame.
rules.description: Character holds phone with back panel / camera bump to viewer when the screen should be presenting the app.

rules.rule: Describe the device positively and pass the per-surface prop crop as a reference: "a Black Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra with centered punch-hole front camera and squared corners, matching the reference exactly" + --image assets/_shared/props/s22-ultra-front.png.
rules.description: Model draws an iPhone (notch/Dynamic Island/Apple logo) or a mismatched Android instead of the S22 Ultra prop.

rules.rule: Pass the real app UI/logo still from assets/<app>/brand/ as an --image reference and prompt "the phone screen shows this exact app UI, sharp, bright, and legible" — for hard composites, edit an existing clean frame + the UI asset instead of composing from scratch.
rules.description: Visible phone screen is blank, generic, or shows a hallucinated UI instead of the real app home screen/logo.

rules.rule: Anchor the character to ONE surface: "single normal <room> with one <sofa/table>, she sits naturally ON the seat cushion, feet on the floor, anatomically correct, one surface only". If the best grid pose sits at a busy multi-surface area, prefer a simpler standing/single-surface cell.
rules.failed_fragment: sitting at the table in the cozy room
rules.description: Character pinned between two tables / merged with furniture / seated inside a sofa arm (the classic GPT Image grid hallucination).

rules.rule: Name the exact wardrobe in every clip prompt and close with the continuity clause: "wearing <the exact garments from the reference>… lighting, wardrobe, and all background details staying completely consistent throughout — a seamless single take".
rules.description: Kling drifts the outfit (color/garment) mid-clip or between clips when wardrobe is not restated explicitly.

rules.rule: Render hands and fingers with natural proportions and articulation. Ensure all fingers are clearly defined and appropriately sized.
Display all on-screen text as sharp, clear, and perfectly legible. Render branding and app store logos with accurate details.
rules.failed_fragment: happily tapping the screen while still angling it toward the lens

rules.rule: Maintain consistent facial features, age, and hair style as the provided persona reference. Ensure the character's appearance is identical to the reference.
rules.failed_fragment: Expand this exact photo... preserve every detail (no persona reference passed)

rules.rule: Ensure all characters have naturally formed hands and fingers. Every limb should appear anatomically correct and clearly defined.
rules.failed_fragment: held by the unseen interviewer's arm

rules.rule: Ensure all hands are anatomically correct with five fingers.
rules.failed_fragment: bring the phone much closer to the camera, screen fills seventy percent of frame (hand wrapped around phone edge)
